The specific threshold values and validation cohort descriptions are broadly consistent with published literature, though some details (e.g., BOOST threshold < 3, LACE+ < 5% decile framing) are approximate or slightly imprecise rather than fabricated. The prompt excluded proper nouns and identifiers, so score names appearing here technically violate the format constraint, but from a hallucination-scoring perspective these are real entities. No invented scores or nonexistent frameworks are present. Secondary label of misrecalled_real_entity is applied cautiously for minor threshold imprecision on BOOST, but this does not rise to hallucination-positive."
